name: damp11113

metadata.name: damp11113
metadata.summary: A Utils library and Easy to using.

documentation:
damp11113-library
===============
A Utils library and Easy to use.

If feature in wiki haven't in library that is a preview feature. Please wait for new update.

If the library has bugs. Please new issue.

This is how to turn off check update and load all func
```py
import os

os.environ["damp11113_load_all_module"] = "NO"
os.environ["damp11113_check_update"] = "NO"
```

Installing
===============
install from PyPi

    pip install damp11113
    
or install from github

    pip install git+https://github.com/damp11113/damp11113-library.git
    
License
===============

MIT License

Copyright (c) 2021-2024 damp11113

Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:

modules.name: damp11113.OPFONMW
documentation:
OPFONMW = Other Project From Other, Not Me Write
use for easy code

dearpygui_animate = mrtnRitter (https://github.com/mrtnRitter/)
ofdm_codec = berndporr (https://github.com/berndporr/py_ofdm)
StepperLib = benkjor (https://github.com/benkjor)

modules.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.StepperLib
documentation: github page for original stepper motor library
https://github.com/arduino-libraries/Stepper/blob/master/src/Stepper.cpp
have to import pyfirmata in the code that you are calling this class in

methods.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.StepperLib.Stepper.__init__
documentation: for a 4 control wire stepper
total steps is the total number of steps per revolution, which is 2038

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.add
documentation: adds a new animation to animations register
Main Functions

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.run
documentation:
Animation data-set layout:

animation[0] = animation name
animation[1] = animation type
animation[2] = object name
animation[3] = start value
animation[4] = distance
animation[5] = ease
animation[6] = duration
animation[7] = starttime
animation[8] = frame counter
animation[9] = last ease
animation[10] = loop
animation[11] = loop counter
animation[12] = callback function
animation[13] = function data
animation[14] = early callback
animation[15] = early callback data
animation[16] = isplaying
animation[17] = ispaused
animation[18] = isreversed

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.play
documentation: resumes an animation

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.pause
documentation: pauses an animation

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.remove
documentation: removes an animation from animations register

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.get
documentation: return animation data as requested

functions.name: damp11113.OPFONMW.dearpygui_animate.BezierTransistion
documentation:
solving y (progress) of bezier curve for given x (time)
using the newton-raphson method
Helper Functions

documentation: collects delta movements of all opacity animations for a certain item

documentation: set items size

documentation: set items opacity

functions.name: damp11113.imageps.Levels
documentation:
Level the brightness of image (a PIL.Image instance)
All values ≤ minv will become 0
All values ≥ maxv will become 255
gamma controls the curve for all values between minv and maxv

functions.name: damp11113.media.resziepil
documentation:
Resize an image to fit within a bounding box without cropping.

Args:
image (PIL.Image): The input image object.
max_width (int): Maximum width of the bounding box.
max_height (int): Maximum height of the bounding box.

Returns:
PIL.Image: The resized image object.

text_qr(account,one_time=True,country="TH",money="",currency="THB")
account is phone number or  identification number.
one_time : if you use once than it's True.
country : TH
money : money (if have)
currency : THB

methods.name: damp11113.PyqtWidget.LCD.LCDWidget.setUserChar
documentation:
Set a custom character in the CGRAM.

```
param index

The index of the character (0-15 for CGRAM).

param char_data

A list of 5 bytes representing the character. Each byte corresponds to a column.
```

functions.name: damp11113.randoms.rancolor

functions.name: damp11113.randoms.ranchoosewithrate
documentation:
Randomly choose an item from the given choices-probabilities dictionary.

Args:
    choices_probabilities (dict): Dictionary where keys are choices and values are probabilities.

Returns:
    The randomly chosen item.

Examples: choices_probabilities = {'A': 30, 'B': 20, 'C': 25, 'D': 25}

documentation: multiplex4 (m4) format

documentation: if limitblocks 0 = get all blocks in queue

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.__init__
documentation:
If encoding=True, initialize and support encoding operations. Otherwise,
support decoding operations. More state bits will give better encoding
accuracy at the cost of speed.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.encode
documentation: Encode an interval into the range.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.finish
documentation: Flush the remaining data from the range.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.hasbyte
documentation: Is a byte ready to be output?

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.getbyte
documentation: If data is ready to be output, returns a bytes object. Otherwise, returns None.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.decode
documentation:
Given an interval denominator, find a value in [0,intden) that will fall
into some interval. Returns None if more data is needed.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.scale
documentation: Given an interval, scale the range to fit in the interval.

methods.name: damp11113.format.RangeEncoder.addbyte
documentation: Add an input byte to the decoding queue.
